Full-Stack Developer • Principal Software Engineer

I'm up for any challenge.

Solution-oriented programmer coding professionally since 2016, specializing in desktop application development and backend architecture, with a versatile background in multi-platform software.

About Me

Hi, I'm Niks! I've been obsessed with code since I was a kid, and I've been building software professionally since 2016. I'm a specialist in desktop development and backend setup, with a proven track record of delivering end-to-end software solutions. My background spans multiple platforms, from native Android apps to complex desktop environments. Currently working from home, I focus on efficient systems and solving the unique challenges that come with desktop software.

Work Experience (9 years, 3 months)

Present
2019

Software Developer

Erfinder Philippines, Tacloban City, Leyte
6 years, 9 months

Key Responsibilities

  • Helped in the development of PIIOX, an open, modular platform designed for control and automation systems.
  • Helped in the development of TESSA, a tool that automates execution of scientific software applications.
  • Developed internal ERP system for Climeo AG.
  • Developed a management tool for Climeo AG IoT devices and clients.
  • Developed several internal applications for Stadler, Inc.
  • Created social media pages, chatbots, and professional websites for various clients.
  • Created promotional materials for various clients.

2016

Android Developer

Hyperworks I.T. Solutions, Tacloban City, Leyte
2 years, 1 month

Key Responsibilities

  • Developed Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) mobile apps and educational mobile apps for Save The Children Philippines and DepEd.
  • Facilitated mobile features development workshops and data collection.
  • Conducted consultation and meeting with DepEd key persons.
  • Provided technical support and training for mobile app development.
  • Developed the website, assisted in the creation of resources, and hosting of the mobile applications and tools.

On The Job Training

Department of Agrarian Reforms, Tacloban City, Leyte
5 months

Key Responsibilities

  • Developed a document management system for the department as replacement for their previous unfinished system.
  • Improved the system to handle large volumes of data, faster referencing, and scanning capabilities.
  • Provided training and support for the new system to the department staff.
  • Assisted in the migration of data from the old system to the new system.
  • Provided technical support and maintenance for the new system.

Let's Work Together

Have a project in mind? Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.

I’m always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions. Whether you have a question, a collaboration idea, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out!

I typically respond within 24-48 hours. For project inquiries, please include as much detail as possible about your requirements, timeline, and budget.

— Niks

John Nichols Ranara

Full-Stack Developer • Principal Software Engineer

Tacloban City, Leyte banikaz@proton.me (+63) 976-002-8684

Professional Summary

Full-Stack Developer and Principal Software Engineer with professional experience since 2016. Specializes in desktop application development and backend architecture, with a versatile background spanning multiple platforms including native Android apps and complex desktop environments. Proven track record of delivering end-to-end software solutions, from IoT device management systems to educational mobile applications. Currently focused on building efficient systems and solving unique challenges in desktop software development.
